verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est verbum Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the word of the Lord came to me, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran sana tapahtui minulle ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: Moreover the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tu, fili hominis, nonne judicas, nonne judicas civitatem sanguinum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֣ה בֶן־אָדָ֔ם הֲתִשְׁפֹּ֥ט הֲתִשְׁפֹּ֖ט אֶת־עִ֣יר הַדָּמִ֑ים וְה֣וֹדַעְתָּ֔הּ אֵ֖ת כׇּל־תּוֹעֲבוֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou son of man, dost thou not judge, dost thou not judge the city of blood?
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä, ihmisen poika, etkös tahdo nuhdella, etkös tahdo nuhdella murhakaupunkia ja hänelle näyttää kaikkia hänen kauhistuksiansa?
verses.king_james: Now, thou son of man, wilt thou judge, wilt thou judge the bloody city? yea, thou shalt shew her all her abominations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ostendes ei omnes abominationes suas, et dices : Hæc dicit Dominus Deus : Civitas effundens sanguinem in medio sui, ut veniat tempus ejus : et quæ fecit idola contra semetipsam, ut pollueretur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָמַרְתָּ֗ כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה עִ֣יר שֹׁפֶ֥כֶת דָּ֛ם בְּתוֹכָ֖הּ לָב֣וֹא עִתָּ֑הּ וְעָשְׂתָ֧ה גִלּוּלִ֛ים עָלֶ֖יהָ לְטׇמְאָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt shew her all her abominations, and shalt say: Thus saith the Lord God: This is the city that sheddeth blood in the midst of her, that her time may come: and that hath made idols against herself, to defile herself.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sano: näin sanoo Herra, Herra: o sinä kaupunki, joka omais veren vuodatat, että sinun aikas tulis, ja sinä, joka epäjumalia tykönäs teet, ettäs itses saastuttaisit!
verses.king_james: Then say thou, Thus saith the Lord God, The city sheddeth blood in the midst of it, that her time may come, and maketh idols against herself to defile herself.

verses.latin_vulgate: In sanguine tuo, qui a te effusus est, deliquisti, et in idolis tuis, quæ fecisti, polluta es : et appropinquare fecisti dies tuos, et adduxisti tempus annorum tuorum : propterea dedi te opprobrium gentibus, et irrisionem universis terris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּדָמֵ֨ךְ אֲשֶׁר־שָׁפַ֜כְתְּ אָשַׁ֗מְתְּ וּבְגִלּוּלַ֤יִךְ אֲשֶׁר־עָשִׂית֙ טָמֵ֔את וַתַּקְרִ֣יבִי יָמַ֔יִךְ וַתָּב֖וֹא עַד־שְׁנוֹתָ֑יִךְ עַל־כֵּ֗ן נְתַתִּ֤יךְ חֶרְפָּה֙ לַגּוֹיִ֔ם וְקַלָּסָ֖ה לְכׇל־הָאֲרָצֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou art become guilty in thy blood which thou hast shed: and thou art defiled in thy idols which thou hast made: and thou hast made thy days to draw near, and hast brought on the time of thy years: therefore have I made thee a reproach to the Gentiles, and a mockery to all countries.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä teet itses vikapääksi siihen vereen, jota vuodatat, ja saastutat itses jumalissa, joita teet; näillä sinä joudutat sinun päiväs, ja saatat, että sinun vuotes tuleman pitää; sentähden tahdon minä sinun nauruksi tehdä pakanain seassa, ja saattaa pilkaksi kaikissa maakunnissa.
verses.king_james: Thou art become guilty in thy blood that thou hast shed; and hast defiled thyself in thine idols which thou hast made; and thou hast caused thy days to draw near, and art come even unto thy years: therefore have I made thee a reproach unto the heathen, and a mocking to all countries.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quæ juxta sunt, et quæ procul a te, triumphabunt de te, sordida, nobilis, grandis interitu.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַקְּרֹב֛וֹת וְהָרְחֹק֥וֹת מִמֵּ֖ךְ יִתְקַלְּסוּ־בָ֑ךְ טְמֵאַ֣ת הַשֵּׁ֔ם רַבַּ֖ת הַמְּהוּמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Those that are near, and those that are far from thee, shall triumph over thee: thou filthy one, infamous, great in destruction.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sekä läsnä että kaukana pitää heidän sinua sylkemän, että sinun häpiällisen sanoman ja suuren vaivan kärsimän pitää.
verses.king_james: Those that be near, and those that be far from thee, shall mock thee, which art infamous and much vexed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce principes Israël singuli in brachio suo fuerunt in te, ad effundendum sanguinem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּה֙ נְשִׂיאֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אִ֥ישׁ לִזְרֹע֖וֹ הָ֣יוּ בָ֑ךְ לְמַ֖עַן שְׁפׇךְ־דָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold the princes of Israel, every one hath employed his arm in thee to shed blood.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, Israelin päämiehet ovat kukin väkevä sinussa verta vuodattamaan.
verses.king_james: Behold, the princes of Israel, every one were in thee to their power to shed blood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Patrem et matrem contumeliis affecerunt : in te advenam calumniati sunt in medio tui : pupillum et viduam contristaverunt apud te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֤ב וָאֵם֙ הֵקַ֣לּוּ בָ֔ךְ לַגֵּ֛ר עָשׂ֥וּ בַעֹ֖שֶׁק בְּתוֹכֵ֑ךְ יָת֥וֹם וְאַלְמָנָ֖ה ה֥וֹנוּ בָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have abused father and mother in thee, they have oppressed the stranger in the midst of thee, they have grieved the fatherless and widow in thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Isänsä ja äitinsä he katsovat ylön sinussa: muukalaisille he väkivaltaa ja vääryyttä tekevät; orpoja ja leskiä he sortavat sinussa.
verses.king_james: In thee have they set light by father and mother: in the midst of thee have they dealt by oppression with the stranger: in thee have they vexed the fatherless and the widow.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sanctuaria mea sprevisti, et sabbata mea polluisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קׇדָשַׁ֖י בָּזִ֑ית וְאֶת־שַׁבְּתֹתַ֖י חִלָּֽלְתְּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast despised my sanctuaries, and profaned my sabbaths.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä katsot minun pyhyyteni ylön, ja turmelet minun sabbatini.
verses.king_james: Thou hast despised mine holy things, and hast profaned my sabbaths.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viri detractores fuerunt in te ad effundendum sanguinem, et super montes comederunt in te : scelus operati sunt in medio tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַנְשֵׁ֥י רָכִ֛יל הָ֥יוּ בָ֖ךְ לְמַ֣עַן שְׁפׇךְ־דָּ֑ם וְאֶל־הֶֽהָרִים֙ אָ֣כְלוּ בָ֔ךְ זִמָּ֖ה עָשׂ֥וּ בְתוֹכֵֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Slanderers have been in thee to shed blood, and they have eaten upon the mountains in thee, they have committed wickedness in the midst of thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pettäjät ovat sinussa verta vuodattamaan; he syövät vuorilla, ja tekevät ylöllistä sinussa.
verses.king_james: In thee are men that carry tales to shed blood: and in thee they eat upon the mountains: in the midst of thee they commit lewdness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verecundiora patris discooperuerunt in te ; immunditiam menstruatæ humiliaverunt in te :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֶרְוַת־אָ֖ב גִּלָּה־בָ֑ךְ טְמֵאַ֥ת הַנִּדָּ֖ה עִנּוּ־בָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have discovered the nakedness of their father in thee, they have humbled the uncleanness of the menstruous woman in thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: He paljastavat isänsä hävyn sinussa, ja vaivaavat saastaisia vaimoja heidän taudissansa,
verses.king_james: In thee have they discovered their fathers’ nakedness: in thee have they humbled her that was set apart for pollution.

verses.latin_vulgate: et unusquisque in uxorem proximi sui operatus est abominationem, et socer nurum suam polluit nefarie : frater sororem suam, filiam patris sui, oppressit in te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִ֣ישׁ ׀ אֶת־אֵ֣שֶׁת רֵעֵ֗הוּ עָשָׂה֙ תּוֹעֵבָ֔ה וְאִ֥ישׁ אֶת־כַּלָּת֖וֹ טִמֵּ֣א בְזִמָּ֑ה וְאִ֛ישׁ אֶת־אֲחֹת֥וֹ בַת־אָבִ֖יו עִנָּה־בָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And every one hath committed abomination with his neighbour's wife, and the father in law hath wickedly defiled his daughter in law, the brother hath oppressed his sister the daughter of his father in thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tekevät kauheutta lähimmäisensä vaimon kanssa: he häpäisevät omat miniänsä ilkivaltaisesti, he tekevät väkivaltaa omille sisarillensa, isäinsä tyttärille.
verses.king_james: And one hath committed abomination with his neighbour’s wife; and another hath lewdly defiled his daughter in law; and another in thee hath humbled his sister, his father’s daughter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Munera acceperunt apud te ad effundendum sanguinem : usuram et superabundantiam accepisti, et avare proximos tuos calumniabaris : meique oblita es, ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֹׁ֥חַד לָֽקְחוּ־בָ֖ךְ לְמַ֣עַן שְׁפׇךְ־דָּ֑ם נֶ֧שֶׁךְ וְתַרְבִּ֣ית לָקַ֗חַתְּ וַתְּבַצְּעִ֤י רֵעַ֙יִךְ֙ בַּעֹ֔שֶׁק וְאֹתִ֣י שָׁכַ֔חַתְּ נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have taken gifts in thee to shed blood: thou hast taken usury and increase, and hast covetously oppressed thy neighbours: and thou hast forgotten me, saith the Lord God.
verses.finnish_biblia: He ottavat lahjoja sinussa, verta vuodattaaksensa; sinä otat koron ja voiton, ja ahnehdit lähimmäiseltäs väkivallalla, ja näin unohdat minun, sanoo Herra, Herra.
verses.king_james: In thee have they taken gifts to shed blood; thou hast taken usury and increase, and thou hast greedily gained of thy neighbours by extortion, and hast forgotten me, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce complosi manus meas super avaritiam tuam quam fecisti, et super sanguinem qui effusus est in medio tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִנֵּה֙ הִכֵּ֣יתִי כַפִּ֔י אֶל־בִּצְעֵ֖ךְ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשִׂ֑ית וְעַ֨ל־דָּמֵ֔ךְ אֲשֶׁ֥ר הָי֖וּ בְּתוֹכֵֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold, I have clapped my hands at thy covetousness, which thou hast exercised: and at the blood that hath been shed in the midst of thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, minä lyön käsiäni yhteen sinun ahneutes tähden, jotas tehnyt olet, ja sen veren tähden, joka sinussa vuodatettu on.
verses.king_james: Behold, therefore I have smitten mine hand at thy dishonest gain which thou hast made, and at thy blood which hath been in the midst of thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid sustinebit cor tuum, aut prævalebunt manus tuæ, in diebus quos ego faciam tibi ? Ego Dominus locutus sum, et faciam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲיַעֲמֹ֤ד לִבֵּךְ֙ אִם־תֶּחֱזַ֣קְנָה יָדַ֔יִךְ לַיָּמִ֕ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר אֲנִ֖י עֹשֶׂ֣ה אוֹתָ֑ךְ אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה דִּבַּ֥רְתִּי וְעָשִֽׂיתִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Shall thy heart endure, or shall thy hands prevail in the days which I will bring upon thee: I the Lord have spoken, and will do it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta luuletkos sinun sydämes voivan kärsiä, ja sinun kätes kestää niinä päivinä kuin minä sinulle tekevä olen? Minä Herra olen sen puhunut, minä myös teen sen.
verses.king_james: Can thine heart endure, or can thine hands be strong, in the days that I shall deal with thee? I the Lord have spoken it, and will do it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dispergam te in nationes, et ventilabo te in terras, et deficere faciam immunditiam tuam a te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲפִיצוֹתִ֤י אוֹתָךְ֙ בַּגּוֹיִ֔ם וְזֵרִיתִ֖יךְ בָּאֲרָצ֑וֹת וַהֲתִמֹּתִ֥י טֻמְאָתֵ֖ךְ מִמֵּֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will disperse thee in the nations, and will scatter thee among the countries, and I will put an end to thy uncleanness in thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tahdon sinun hajoittaa pakanain sekaan ja ajaa sinun maakuntiin, ja tahdon sinun saastaisuutes lopettaa;
verses.king_james: And I will scatter thee among the heathen, and disperse thee in the countries, and will consume thy filthiness out of thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et possidebo te in conspectu gentium : et scies quia ego Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנִחַ֥לְתְּ בָּ֖ךְ לְעֵינֵ֣י גוֹיִ֑ם וְיָדַ֖עַתְּ כִּי־אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And I will possess thee in the sight of the Gentiles, and thou shalt know that I am the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin että sinä pakanain seassa pitää kirottuna pidettämän, ja sinun pitää ymmärtämän minun olevan Herra.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt take thine inheritance in thyself in the sight of the heathen, and thou shalt know that I am the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est verbum Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the word of the Lord came to me, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran sana tapahtui minulle ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: And the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Fili hominis, versa est mihi domus Israël in scoriam : omnes isti æs, et stannum, et ferrum, et plumbum in medio fornacis : scoria argenti facti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אָדָ֕ם הָיוּ־לִ֥י בֵֽית־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל (לסוג) [לְסִ֑יג] כֻּלָּ֡ם נְ֠חֹ֠שֶׁת וּבְדִ֨יל וּבַרְזֶ֤ל וְעוֹפֶ֙רֶת֙ בְּת֣וֹךְ כּ֔וּר סִגִ֥ים כֶּ֖סֶף הָיֽוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Son of man, the house of Israel is become dross to me: all these are brass, and tin, and iron, and lead, in the midst of the furnace: they are become the dross of silver.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä, ihmisen poika, Israelin huone on minulle karreksi tullut; kaikki heidän vaskensa, tinansa, rautansa ja lyijynsä on ahjossa hopian karreksi tullut.
verses.king_james: Son of man, the house of Israel is to me become dross: all they are brass, and tin, and iron, and lead, in the midst of the furnace; they are even the dross of silver.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea hæc dicit Dominus Deus : Eo quod versi estis omnes in scoriam, propterea ecce ego congregabo vos in medio Jerusalem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה יַ֛עַן הֱי֥וֹת כֻּלְּכֶ֖ם לְסִגִ֑ים לָכֵן֙ הִנְנִ֣י קֹבֵ֣ץ אֶתְכֶ֔ם אֶל־תּ֖וֹךְ יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore thus saith the Lord God: Because you are all turned into dross, therefore behold I will gather you together in the midst of Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden sanoo Herra, Herra näin: että te kaikki olette karreksi tulleet, sentähden katso, minä kokoon teidät Jerusalemiin.
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord God; Because ye are all become dross, behold, therefore I will gather you into the midst of Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: congregatione argenti, et æris, et stanni, et ferri, et plumbi, in medio fornacis, ut succendam in ea ignem ad conflandum. Sic congregabo in furore meo, et in ira mea : et requiescam, et conflabo vos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קְבֻ֣צַת כֶּ֡סֶף וּ֠נְחֹ֠שֶׁת וּבַרְזֶ֨ל וְעוֹפֶ֤רֶת וּבְדִיל֙ אֶל־תּ֣וֹךְ כּ֔וּר לָפַֽחַת־עָלָ֥יו אֵ֖שׁ לְהַנְתִּ֑יךְ כֵּ֤ן אֶקְבֹּץ֙ בְּאַפִּ֣י וּבַחֲמָתִ֔י וְהִנַּחְתִּ֥י וְהִתַּכְתִּ֖י אֶתְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: As they gather silver, and brass, and tin, and iron, and lead in the midst of the furnace: that I may kindle a fire in it to melt it: so will I gather you together in my fury and in my wrath, and will take my rest, and I will melt you down.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niinkuin hopia, vaski, rauta, lyijy ja tina ahjoon kootaan, että tuli sen alle puhallettaisiin ja ne sulaisivat: niin tahdon minä vihassani ja hirmuisuudessani koota, panna sisälle ja sulata teitä.
verses.king_james: As they gather silver, and brass, and iron, and lead, and tin, into the midst of the furnace, to blow the fire upon it, to melt it; so will I gather you in mine anger and in my fury, and I will leave you there, and melt you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et congregabo vos, et succendam vos in igne furoris mei, et conflabimini in medio ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכִנַּסְתִּ֣י אֶתְכֶ֔ם וְנָפַחְתִּ֥י עֲלֵיכֶ֖ם בְּאֵ֣שׁ עֶבְרָתִ֑י וְנִתַּכְתֶּ֖ם בְּתוֹכָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And will gather you together, and will burn you in the fire of my wrath, and you shall be melted in the midst thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä tahdon koota teidät, ja minun vihani tulen teidän seassanne puhaltaa, että te siellä sulaisitte.
verses.king_james: Yea, I will gather you, and blow upon you in the fire of my wrath, and ye shall be melted in the midst thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ut conflatur argentum in medio fornacis, sic eritis in medio ejus : et scietis quia ego Dominus cum effuderim indignationem meam super vos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּהִתּ֥וּךְ כֶּ֙סֶף֙ בְּת֣וֹךְ כּ֔וּר כֵּ֖ן תֻּתְּכ֣וּ בְתוֹכָ֑הּ וִֽידַעְתֶּם֙ כִּֽי־אֲנִ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה שָׁפַ֥כְתִּי חֲמָתִ֖י עֲלֵיכֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: As silver is melted in the midst of the furnace, so shall you be in the midst thereof: and you shall know that I am the Lord, when I have poured out my indignation upon you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niinkuin hopia ahjossa sulaa, niin teidän pitää myös siinä sulaman; ja teidän pitää ymmärtämän, että minä Herra olen vuodattanut vihani teidän päällenne.
verses.king_james: As silver is melted in the midst of the furnace, so shall ye be melted in the midst thereof; and ye shall know that I the Lord have poured out my fury upon you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est verbum Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the word of the Lord came to me, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran sana tapahtui minulle ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: And the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Fili hominis, dic ei : Tu es terra immunda, et non compluta in die furoris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אָדָ֕ם אֱמׇר־לָ֕הּ אַ֣תְּ אֶ֔רֶץ לֹ֥א מְטֹהָרָ֖ה הִ֑יא לֹ֥א גֻשְׁמָ֖הּ בְּי֥וֹם זָֽעַם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Son of man, say to her: Thou art a land that is unclean, and not rained upon in the day of wrath.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä, ihmisen poika, sano heille: sinä olet se maa, joka ei ole puhdistettu, niinkuin se, joka ei sadetta saa vihan ajalla.
verses.king_james: Son of man, say unto her, Thou art the land that is not cleansed, nor rained upon in the day of indignation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conjuratio prophetarum in medio ejus : sicut leo rugiens, rapiensque prædam, animas devoraverunt : opes et pretium acceperunt : viduas ejus multiplicaverunt in medio illius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קֶ֤שֶׁר נְבִיאֶ֙יהָ֙ בְּתוֹכָ֔הּ כַּאֲרִ֥י שׁוֹאֵ֖ג טֹ֣רֵֽף טָ֑רֶף נֶ֣פֶשׁ אָכָ֗לוּ חֹ֤סֶן וִיקָר֙ יִקָּ֔חוּ אַלְמְנוֹתֶ֖יהָ הִרְבּ֥וּ בְתוֹכָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: There is a conspiracy of prophets in the midst thereof: like a lion that roareth and catcheth the prey, they have devoured souls, they have taken riches and hire, they have made many widows in the midst thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Prophetat, jotka siellä ovat, ovat vannoneet heitänsä yhteen, niinkuin kiljuva jalopeura, kuin se saaliin saa; he syövät sieluja, tempaavat tavaran ja rahan, ja tekevät sinne paljon leskiä.
verses.king_james: There is a conspiracy of her prophets in the midst thereof, like a roaring lion ravening the prey; they have devoured souls; they have taken the treasure and precious things; they have made her many widows in the midst thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacerdotes ejus contempserunt legem meam, et polluerunt sanctuaria mea : inter sanctum et profanum non habuerunt distantiam, et inter pollutum et mundum non intellexerunt : et a sabbatis meis averterunt oculos suos, et coinquinabar in medio eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּהֲנֶ֜יהָ חָמְס֣וּ תוֹרָתִי֮ וַיְחַלְּל֣וּ קׇדָשַׁי֒ בֵּֽין־קֹ֤דֶשׁ לְחֹל֙ לֹ֣א הִבְדִּ֔ילוּ וּבֵין־הַטָּמֵ֥א לְטָה֖וֹר לֹ֣א הוֹדִ֑יעוּ וּמִשַּׁבְּתוֹתַי֙ הֶעְלִ֣ימוּ עֵינֵיהֶ֔ם וָאֵחַ֖ל בְּתוֹכָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Her priests have despised my law, and have defiled my sanctuaries: they have put no difference between holy and profane: nor have distinguished between the polluted and the clean: and they have turned away their eyes from my sabbaths, and I was profaned in the midst of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän pappinsa rikkovat minun lakini, ja turmelevat minun pyhäni; ei he pidä pyhäin ja saastaisten välillä eroitusta, eikä opeta mikä puhdas ja saastainen on, eikä tottele minun sabbatiani, ja minä saastutetaan heidän seassansa.
verses.king_james: Her priests have violated my law, and have profaned mine holy things: they have put no difference between the holy and profane, neither have they shewed difference between the unclean and the clean, and have hid their eyes from my sabbaths, and I am profaned among them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Principes ejus in medio illius quasi lupi rapientes prædam ad effundendum sanguinem, et ad perdendas animas, et avare ad sectanda lucra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׂרֶ֣יהָ בְקִרְבָּ֔הּ כִּזְאֵבִ֖ים טֹ֣רְפֵי טָ֑רֶף לִשְׁפׇּךְ־דָּם֙ לְאַבֵּ֣ד נְפָשׁ֔וֹת לְמַ֖עַן בְּצֹ֥עַ בָּֽצַע׃
verses.douay_rheims: Her princes in the midst of her, are like wolves ravening the prey to shed blood, and to destroy souls, and to run after gains through covetousness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän päämiehensä heidän seassansa ovat niinkuin raatelevaiset sudet, verta vuodattamaan ja sieluja surmaamaan ahneutensa tähden.
verses.king_james: Her princes in the midst thereof are like wolves ravening the prey, to shed blood, and to destroy souls, to get dishonest gain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prophetæ autem ejus liniebant eos absque temperamento, videntes vana, et divinantes eis mendacium, dicentes : Hæc dicit Dominus Deus : cum Dominus non sit locutus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּנְבִיאֶ֗יהָ טָח֤וּ לָהֶם֙ תָּפֵ֔ל חֹזִ֣ים שָׁ֔וְא וְקֹסְמִ֥ים לָהֶ֖ם כָּזָ֑ב אֹמְרִ֗ים כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה וַיהֹוָ֖ה לֹ֥א דִבֵּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And her prophets have daubed them without tempering the mortar, seeing vain things, and divining lies unto them, saying: Thus saith the Lord God: when the Lord hath not spoken.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän prophetansa sivuvat heitä sekoittamattomalla kalkilla, saarnaavat turhuutta, ja ennustavat heille valheita, ja sanovat: näin sanoo Herra, Herra; vaikka ei Herra sitä puhunut olekaan.
verses.king_james: And her prophets have daubed them with untempered morter, seeing vanity, and divining lies unto them, saying, Thus saith the Lord God, when the Lord hath not spoken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Populi terræ calumniabantur calumniam, et rapiebant violenter : egenum et pauperem affligebant, et advenam opprimebant calumnia absque judicio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַ֤ם הָאָ֙רֶץ֙ עָ֣שְׁקוּ עֹ֔שֶׁק וְגָזְל֖וּ גָּזֵ֑ל וְעָנִ֤י וְאֶבְיוֹן֙ הוֹנ֔וּ וְאֶת־הַגֵּ֥ר עָשְׁק֖וּ בְּלֹ֥א מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: The people of the land have used oppression, and committed robbery: they afflicted the needy and poor, and they oppressed the stranger by calumny without judgment.
verses.finnish_biblia: Maan kansa tekee väkivaltaa, ja he ryöstävät ryövyydellä ja sortavat köyhän ja raadollisen, ja tekevät muukalaiselle väkivaltaa ja vääryyttä.
verses.king_james: The people of the land have used oppression, and exercised robbery, and have vexed the poor and needy: yea, they have oppressed the stranger wrongfully.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et quæsivi de eis virum qui interponeret sepem, et staret oppositus contra me pro terra, ne dissiparem eam : et non inveni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֲבַקֵּ֣שׁ מֵהֶ֡ם אִ֣ישׁ גֹּֽדֵר־גָּדֵר֩ וְעֹמֵ֨ד בַּפֶּ֧רֶץ לְפָנַ֛י בְּעַ֥ד הָאָ֖רֶץ לְבִלְתִּ֣י שַׁחֲתָ֑הּ וְלֹ֖א מָצָֽאתִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I sought among them for a man that might set up a hedge, and stand in the gap before me in favour of the land, that I might not destroy it: and I found none.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä etsin heidän seassansa sitä miestä, joka aidan panis ja seisois veräjällä minun edessäni, etten minä maata turmelisi; mutta en minä ketään löytänyt.
verses.king_james: And I sought for a man among them, that should make up the hedge, and stand in the gap before me for the land, that I should not destroy it: but I found none.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et effudi super eos indignationem meam ; in igne iræ meæ consumpsi eos : viam eorum in caput eorum reddidi, ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶשְׁפֹּ֤ךְ עֲלֵיהֶם֙ זַעְמִ֔י בְּאֵ֥שׁ עֶבְרָתִ֖י כִּלִּיתִ֑ים דַּרְכָּם֙ בְּרֹאשָׁ֣ם נָתַ֔תִּי נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And I poured out my indignation upon them, in the fire of my wrath I consumed them: I have rendered their way upon their own head, saith the Lord God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden vuodatan minä vihani heidän päällensä, ja hirmuisuuteni tulella minä lopetan heidät, ja annan heidän tiensä heidän päänsä päälle, sanoo Herra, Herra.
verses.king_james: Therefore have I poured out mine indignation upon them; I have consumed them with the fire of my wrath: their own way have I recompensed upon their heads, saith the Lord God.
